title: penstemon humilis var. obtusifolius
intro: Penstemon humilis var. obtusifolius, also known as the small penstemon or dwarf beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Penstemon humilis var. obtusifolius include reducing inflammation, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
